thread.title: Former Warriors Exec Bob Myers Appointed To UC Board Of Regents
thread.title_full: Former Warriors Exec Bob Myers Appointed To UC Board Of Regents

author: CBS San Francisco
title: Former Warriors Exec Bob Myers Appointed To UC Board Of Regents
text:
[Politics & Government](/california/berkeley/politics)
Former Warriors Exec Bob Myers Appointed To UC Board Of Regents
UC board chair Janet Reilly and UC president Michael Drake welcomed Myers as UC's newest regent in a statement Thursday.
CBS Bay Area
November 22, 2024
Find out what's happening in Berkeleywith free, real-time updates from Patch.
Former Golden State Warriors basketball executive Bob Myers was appointed to the University of California Board of Regents on Thursday, UC officials announced.
Gov. Gavin Newsom made the appointment of Myers as a regent, which serves a 12-year term on the board that makes policy decisions for UC and its campuses.
Find out what's happening in Berkeleywith free, real-time updates from Patch.
Myers, a graduate from UCLA, was a sports agent before being hired by the Warriors in 2011 and was eventually general manager and president of basketball operations during the tenure when the team won four National Basketball Association championships. Myers [retired from the Warriors in 2023](https://www.cbsnews.com/sanfrancisco/news/bob-myers-steps-down-golden-state-warriors-gm-dynasty-president/) and has been an ESPN studio host and analyst.
